title: Responsibility for Repatriation Costs of OFWs
content:
1. All costs attendant to repatriation shall be borne or charged to the agency concerned and/or its principal.
2. If the principal fails to provide for the costs of repatriation, the POEA shall require the local deploying agency to provide the plane ticket or a prepaid ticket advice (PTA) for the OFW.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
